title: Remove old EVP-based nist_ecdh module and update cfg gates in lib.rs
description: After the native implementation passes all tests: (1) Delete the old nist_ecdh module (wolfcrypt/src/ecdh.rs lines 514-863, the block under #[cfg(all(wolfssl_openssl_extra, wolfssl_ecc))]). (2) In wolfcrypt/src/lib.rs, change the NIST ECDH re-export cfg gates from #[cfg(all(feature='ecdh', wolfssl_openssl_extra, wolfssl_ecc))] to #[cfg(all(feature='ecdh', wolfssl_ecc))]. (3) Remove the EVP imports (EC_GROUP_free, EC_KEY_free, ECDH_compute_key, NID_X9_62_prime256v1, etc.) from wolfcrypt-rs/src/lib.rs if they are no longer used anywhere else. (4) Update cfg(wolfssl_openssl_extra) in any conformance tests that tested the old NIST ECDH path.
